meta.title: Chat Enhancer for YouTube - YouTube live chat tools
meta.description: Suite of enhancements that make YouTube live chat easier to follow and participate in.
meta.ogDescription: Suite of enhancements that make YouTube live chat easier to follow and participate in.
meta.imageAlt: Chat Enhancer for YouTube showing native-feeling live chat translation, inbox, and emoji tools.

blog.archiveCopy: Release notes and project updates for Chat Enhancer for YouTube.

hero.title: Chat Enhancer for YouTube
hero.copy: Suite of enhancements that make YouTube live chat easier to follow and participate in.
hero.disclaimer: Not affiliated with YouTube or Google.

features.title:
Changes where chat
already happens
features.translationBody: Read incoming messages in your language, or translate what you're typing before you send it.
features.mentionBody: Mention or quote people quickly, keep one conversation visible, and recover unsent drafts after refreshing the same stream.
features.contextBody: Click an avatar to review recent messages, save the ones you want to keep, and open their channel when needed.
features.inboxBody: Mentions and messages with custom keywords you choose go straight to your inbox, with optional sound alerts.
features.emojisBody: Your most-used reactions stay at the top of YouTube's emoji picker.
features.commandsBody: Press Tab to expand short commands into mentions, quotes, time helpers, translations, inbox watches, and settings.
features.walkthroughTitle: Watch a walkthrough of the features
features.walkthroughBody: See translation, Inbox, Focus mode, bookmarks, emojis, commands, and popup settings working together.

walkthroughVideo.introTitle: Chat Enhancer works inside YouTube live chat
walkthroughVideo.introBody: Small tools appear where chat already happens, without replacing YouTube chat.
walkthroughVideo.outroBody: Translation, replies, context, Inbox, bookmarks, emojis, commands, Playground, and popup settings working together.
walkthroughVideo.translateLiveChatBody: Enable it from chat settings, then choose language and display mode in the extension popup.
walkthroughVideo.translationsAppearBody: Messages can stay readable below the original text.
walkthroughVideo.replaceMessageBody: Choose the Replace translation display in the extension settings for a more compact view.
walkthroughVideo.translateDraftBody: Pick a language, write normally, and the draft is translated before sending.
walkthroughVideo.protectedDraftPartsBody: The draft translator protects the pieces YouTube chat needs to keep untouched.
walkthroughVideo.replyFasterBody: The message menu adds compact Mention and Quote actions without crowding the menu.
walkthroughVideo.authorShortcutsBody: Author names also support quick mention and quote drafts.
walkthroughVideo.recentMessagesBody: Click an avatar to review that user’s recent messages, save any you want to keep, and use the channel shortcut.
walkthroughVideo.profileContextBody: Compact Save and Jump controls keep the profile card useful without crowding it.
walkthroughVideo.focusThreadBody: Focus mode keeps the selected conversation near the reply box.
walkthroughVideo.focusConversationBody: Click a handle to start Focus mode while the main chat keeps moving.
walkthroughVideo.openInboxBody: Mentions and watched keywords are saved locally per stream.
walkthroughVideo.findMessagesBody: Saved rows can be reviewed later and jumped back to while still visible.
walkthroughVideo.manageKeywordsBody: Add words or phrases here so matching chat messages go to your Inbox.
walkthroughVideo.selectedKeywordsBody: The current list is shown as chips you can remove whenever you want.
walkthroughVideo.gamesOptInBody: Turn it on if you want to play games with other users.
walkthroughVideo.gamesInChatBody: After you opt in, the Playground button appears beside Inbox.
walkthroughVideo.browseGamesBody: See the available games first. Nothing starts until you choose one and select someone to play with.
walkthroughVideo.streamGamesBody: HELP-A-FRIEND! Trivia works on replays after a stream ends. The Wild Wild Chat and Stick Around! work during live chat; Chess works in either.
walkthroughVideo.addBookmarkBody: The bookmark keeps the message and its stream context.
walkthroughVideo.bookmarksPopupBody: Saved messages stay with their author, stream, and posted time in the popup.
walkthroughVideo.quickEmojisBody: The quick popover keeps common reactions one move away.
walkthroughVideo.emojiPickerTitle: Reuse them in the full picker
walkthroughVideo.emojiPickerBody: Your most-used row also appears inside YouTube’s emoji picker.
walkthroughVideo.commandsBody: Type a slash command in your draft, then press Tab to expand it before sending.
walkthroughVideo.timeHelpersBody: Type /when with a time, press Tab, and the command becomes a countdown in your draft.
walkthroughVideo.popupSettingsTitle: Advanced settings live in the extension popup
walkthroughVideo.popupSettingsBody: Check connection status, manage less-frequent options, review bookmarks, and use the reset button here.

playground.title:
Tiny games for
live chat breaks
playground.copy: Playground is an opt-in games space that makes streams more interactive. Pick a game: invite an available viewer*, start playing, and keep chat nearby.
playground.imageAlt: Floating chess game panel inside YouTube live chat
playground.note: * Players both need the extension to play together

playgroundPage.metaTitle: Playground - Tiny games for YouTube live chat
playgroundPage.metaDescription: Explore Playground, an opt-in collection of tiny games that stays close to YouTube live chat.
playgroundPage.metaImageAlt: Playground games inside Chat Enhancer for YouTube live chat
playgroundPage.introFirst: Playground is an opt-in games space that makes streams more interactive.
playgroundPage.introSecond: Pick a game, invite someone, start playing, and keep chat nearby.
playgroundPage.computerBody: Every Playground game includes a Computer opponent, so you can start a match without waiting for another viewer. Pick a game, choose Computer, and keep the stream close.

chess.title: Good Ol' Chess
chess.body: Keep a familiar chessboard beside chat. Invite another viewer or choose a Beginner, Club, or Master Computer opponent without leaving the stream.
chess.alt: Chess board in a floating Playground panel beside YouTube live chat

trivia.title: HELP-A-FRIEND! Trivia
trivia.body: YouTube replay moments turn into a quick chat-style quiz. Do you remember what happened during the stream? Invite a friend and find out.
trivia.alt: HELP-A-FRIEND! Trivia asking viewers to pick an answer

wild.title: The Wild Wild Chat
wild.body: Chat becomes a fast bounty hunt where players race to claim matching messages. Who is taking home all the loot?
wild.alt: The Wild Wild Chat bounty board inside a Playground panel

stickAround.title: Stick Around!
stickAround.body: Stick Around! turns the live chat feed into a tiny fighting arena with falling chat bubbles. Push your opponent out of the ring before they do.
stickAround.alt: Stick Around! turning the YouTube live chat feed into a fighting arena

screenshots.title:
Native-feeling
chat improvements
screenshots.translationBody: Incoming messages can be translated automatically. The chat box can also translate what you're typing before you send it.
screenshots.translationHighlightHtml: Automated translations are highlighted with a subtle underline and a Google Translate icon
screenshots.mentionAlt: YouTube live chat inbox and message action menu
screenshots.mentionMenuHtml: Click on a message and “Quote” or “Mention”.
screenshots.mentionAuthorHtml: Click on a @username to mention someone. Alt-click or Option-click on a @username to quote someone.
screenshots.mentionInboxHtml: Never miss a mention: when you’re mentioned in chat, the message is added to your Inbox
screenshots.mentionSound: You can also turn on a sound for notifications.
screenshots.extrasTitle: More ways to keep up when chat is busy
screenshots.extrasAvatar: Click an avatar to review recent messages, save the ones you want to keep, and open their channel.
screenshots.extrasEmoji: Find your favorite emojis at the top of the emoji picker.
screenshots.extrasCommands: Use Tab commands for helpful shortcuts, including:
screenshots.commandReplyBody: Mention the last person who mentioned you
screenshots.commandTimeBody: Insert the current time for a place
screenshots.commandTimeUntilBody: Insert the time left until a local time
screenshots.commandWatchBody: Save matching messages to your inbox
screenshots.extrasAlt: YouTube live chat profile card, commands, and frequent emoji row
screenshots.commandsFullLinkScreenshot: View full command reference on chatenhancer.com
screenshots.mentionFocus: Focus on one conversation while chat keeps moving.

install.title: Install Chat Enhancer
install.copy: Get it from the Chrome Web Store, Firefox Add-ons, or the Mac App Store, or build the extension from source for local development. Other Chromium-based browsers can generally use the Chrome build.
install.updatePendingBody: The latest release is still pending for {stores}.
install.privateQuestions: You can also email us at
install.gettingStartedBody: Install, refresh YouTube once if it was already open, then use the extension where live chat already is.
install.stepStoreBody: Use the install button above. Open Other stores if you need a different browser store for your setup.
install.stepRefreshTitle: Open or refresh YouTube live chat
install.stepRefreshBody: Refresh any YouTube live chat tabs that were already open. A brief startup effect may play; you'll know the chat enhancements are ready when the inbox icon appears in YouTube chat.
install.stepSettingsBody: The extension works in live chat automatically. For complete settings, click the browser toolbar extensions icon and choose Chat Enhancer to reveal all the options. Pin it if you want faster access.
install.stepUseBody: Message menus, avatar cards, the inbox button, frequent emojis, and Tab commands appear and can be used within YouTube's chat interface.
install.stepRefreshBodyBeforeIcon: Refresh any YouTube live chat tabs that were already open. A brief startup effect may play; you'll know the chat enhancements are ready when the inbox icon
install.stepSettingsBodyBeforeIcon: The extension works in live chat automatically. For complete settings, click the browser toolbar extensions icon
install.stepSettingsBodyAfterIcon: Chat Enhancer to reveal all the options. Pin it if you want faster access.

privacy.title: We respect your privacy
privacy.copy: The extension is designed to keep routine chat enhancements on your device. Translation is the one feature that needs an external service, and it only runs after you choose a target language.
privacy.scopeBody: Runs only on YouTube live chat and live chat replay pages.
privacy.storageBody: Settings, inbox messages, watched keywords, bookmarks, frequent emoji counts, and unsent chat drafts stay in browser extension storage.
privacy.translationBody: Off by default. If enabled, incoming chat text or draft text you choose to translate is sent to Google Translate without your YouTube cookies or credentials.
privacy.trackingBody: No analytics, browsing history collection, or data resale.

commands.title: Chat faster with commands
commands.copy: Use short commands for mentions, quotes, time checks, translations, inbox watches, and settings without leaving the chat box.
commands.actionCopy: Press Tab to fill the message, review it, then send when you're ready.
commands.wholeBody: Should be the only text in the input.
commands.mentionDescription: Mention the author of your newest inbox message.
commands.quoteDescription: Without a handle, quote your newest inbox message. With @handle, quote that user's latest seen message.
commands.focusDescription: With @handle, open focus mode for that user. Without a handle, focus the latest user who mentioned you.
commands.timeDescription: Insert the current local time, or the current time for a supported place/timezone.
commands.whenDescription: Insert the duration until or since a time/date, optionally in a supported place/timezone.
commands.translateDescription: Translate custom text in the chat box before sending it.
commands.watchDescription: Add watched keywords or phrases. Without text, show your current watch list.
commands.setTranslateDescription: Set the translation language. Use off to disable translation. Use /lang without a language to show the current target.

footer.disclaimer: Chat Enhancer for YouTube is not affiliated with YouTube or Google.

supportPage.title: Support and feedback
supportPage.description: Choose how to contact Chat Enhancer for YouTube for bug reports, feature ideas, and private questions.
supportPage.heading: Choose the support route
supportPage.intro: Pick email when the details should stay private; pick GitHub Issues when a public thread helps fix or prioritize the work.
supportPage.pickerHint: If you are unsure, email first.
supportPage.emailBody: Best for screenshots with personal details, store questions, setup-specific problems, and anything you would not want posted publicly.
supportPage.issuesBody: Best for reproducible bugs, feature requests, public follow-up, and details other users can confirm or search for later.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
privacyPolicy.description: How Chat Enhancer for YouTube handles local storage, translation, Playground data, and privacy controls.
